name: Twice Baked Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup green bell peppers, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Bake the potatoes for about 45 to 50 minutes until cooked.
3. Gently scoop out the potato pulp with a spoon and mash it.
4. In a separate pan, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the bell peppers and mushrooms. Cook for five minutes or until slightly tender. Season with salt and pepper, then remove from heat.
5. Mix the egg into the mashed potatoes. Add the cream, salt, and pepper to taste (use crushed red pepper if desired).
6. Stir in the heavy cream and vegetables.
7. Scoop the mixture back into the potato skins.
8. Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese over the potatoes (the more, the better).
9. Bake for about 15 minutes until golden brown.
